publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Manuscripts, photographs, drawings, films, slides, watercolors, and greeting cards.
did.abstract: Erotic and pornographic prose manuscripts, photographs, drawings, films, slides, watercolors, and greeting cards collected by Bowman over a period of more than forty years.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: The Calvert W. Bowman Collection consists of erotic and pornographic prose manuscripts, photographs, drawings, films, slides, watercolors, and greeting cards collected by Bowman over a period of more than forty years. Many of the photographs, greeting cards, and drawings have been pasted into scrapbooks. The theme of the collection is predominantly gay male, though there are a small number of heterosexual and bisexual topics evident. Some of the collected photographs are historical, and date from a much earlier time. The material is exclusively erotic and pornographic, and includes physique photographs and drawings. The many works of short prose fiction are similarly erotic and pornographic, but include several more heterosexual pieces. A wide range of sexual motifs is present in the prose.

defitem.label: Series I. Erotic and Pornographic Prose Fiction
Series III. Photographs, Drawings and Paintings

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Calvert W. Bowman papers, #7318. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Series I. Erotic and Pornographic Prose Fiction

did.abstract: Including original typescripts and holographs, and carbon copies and photocopies of same. Some are illustrated with drawings.

17 scrapbooks of erotic and pornographic photographs and drawings; 1 scrapbook of advertisements, clippings, physique photographs, and postcards; 1 miniature scrapbook of historical and classical erotic paintings and drawings.
10 scrapbooks of erotic and pornographic photographs and drawings; 1 folder of 5 photographs; 2 scrapbooks of gay greeting cards, c. 1964

did.unittitle: Series III. Photographs, Drawings and Paintings

did.abstract: 4 scrapbooks of erotic and pornographic photographs and drawings; 91 envelopes and 4 folders of photographs and drawings; 1 large envelope of photographs and drawings
